terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to TheIAdvisor. By accessing and using our platform, you agree to the terms and conditions described in this document.
terms.section1Text: By creating an account or using any feature of TheIAdvisor, you fully accept these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.
terms.section2Text: TheIAdvisor is a SaaS AI sales assistant platform that provides real-time call transcription, contextual AI suggestions, and WhatsApp Business integration.
terms.section3Title: 3. Use of Service and Acceptable Use
terms.section3Text: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. It is prohibited to use the platform for illegal, fraudulent, or rights-violating activities.
terms.section4Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your access credentials and for all activities conducted under your account.
terms.section5Text: Plans are billed monthly in Brazilian Reais (BRL). Payment is processed via Stripe. Invoices are generated automatically and sent by email.
terms.section6Text: All content, source code, design, trademarks, and materials of TheIAdvisor are exclusive intellectual property of the company. Reproduction without authorization is prohibited.
terms.section7Text: We collect and process personal data in compliance with LGPD (General Data Protection Law). See our Privacy Policy for details.
terms.section8Text: We will endeavor to keep the service available 24/7, but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. Scheduled maintenance will be communicated in advance.
terms.section9Text: TheIAdvisor shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.
terms.section10Text: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Access remains active until the end of the paid period. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.
terms.section11Text: We may update these terms periodically. Significant changes will be notified by email or via the platform with 30 days advance notice.
terms.section12Text: These terms are governed by Brazilian law. The courts of Sao Paulo/SP are elected to resolve any disputes.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: TheIAdvisor is committed to protecting personal data in compliance with LGPD (General Data Protection Law — Law 13.709/2018).
privacy.section1Text: TheIAdvisor, operated by its responsible company, is the data controller of personal data collected through the platform, as defined by LGPD.
privacy.section2Intro: We collect the following types of personal data:
privacy.section2Item2: Usage data: access logs, platform interactions
privacy.section2Item3: Communication data: call transcriptions, WhatsApp messages
privacy.section2Item4: Payment data: processed directly by Stripe (PCI-compliant)
privacy.section2Item5: Device data: browser, operating system, IP
privacy.section2Item6: Authentication data: managed by Clerk (identity provider)
privacy.section3Text: Data processing is based on LGPD Art. 7: contract execution (Art. 7, V), data subject consent (Art. 7, I), and legitimate interest of the controller (Art. 7, IX).
privacy.section4Text: Data is used for: service delivery, platform improvement, transactional communications, legal compliance, and aggregate usage analysis.
privacy.section5Intro: Your data may be shared with:
privacy.section5Item4: Payment processor (Stripe) — for billing and invoices
privacy.section5Footer: No personal data is sold to third parties.
privacy.section6Text: Personal data is retained for the period necessary to fulfill the described purposes. After deletion request, data is removed within 30 days, except when retention is required by law.
privacy.section7Item3: Correction of incomplete or outdated data
privacy.section7Item4: Anonymization or blocking of unnecessary data
privacy.section7Footer: To exercise your rights, access account settings or contact us at team@theiadvisor.com.
privacy.section8Text: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect personal data: encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, multi-factor authentication, role-based access control (RBAC), access auditing.
privacy.section9Text: Some data may be processed by providers located outside Brazil. We ensure these transfers comply with LGPD Art. 33.
privacy.section10Text: We use essential cookies for platform operation and performance cookies to improve the experience. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
privacy.section11Text: In case of a security incident involving personal data, we will notify ANPD and affected data subjects as per LGPD Art. 48, within a reasonable timeframe.
privacy.section12Text: For questions related to personal data protection, contact our DPO at: dpo@theiadvisor.com.
privacy.section13Text: This policy may be updated periodically. Changes will be communicated by email or via the platform.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about TheIAdvisor.
help.contactDesc: Our support team is ready to help you.

whatIs.a: TheIAdvisor is a SaaS AI sales assistant platform that helps salespeople close more deals through real-time suggestions during calls and WhatsApp conversations.

howToStart.a: Create your account, complete the 4-step onboarding, configure your channels (phone and/or WhatsApp), and start receiving AI suggestions in your customer interactions.

channels.a: We currently support phone calls (via Twilio) with real-time transcription and WhatsApp Business with message analysis and contextual suggestions.

callAI.q: How does AI work during calls?
callAI.a: AI transcribes the call in real-time using Deepgram (~200ms latency) and generates contextual suggestions via GPT-4o-mini, displayed instantly on the salesperson's dashboard.

countries.q: Which countries are supported for calls?
countries.a: We currently offer US numbers (+1). Brazilian numbers (+55) will be available soon.

recording.a: Yes, calls can be recorded and stored securely on Cloudflare R2. Full transcriptions are available on the dashboard.

whatsappConnect.a: You need a WhatsApp Business API account (via Meta Business Manager). Configure the Access Token and Phone Number ID in the platform settings.

whatsappAI.q: Does AI respond automatically on WhatsApp?
whatsappAI.a: No. AI analyzes incoming messages and suggests responses to the salesperson. The salesperson decides whether to send the suggestion, edit it, or write their own response.

messageLimits.a: Limits vary by plan: Starter (1,000 suggestions/month), Professional (5,000/month), Enterprise (unlimited).

plans.a: We offer 3 plans: Starter (R$97/month), Professional (R$297/month), and Enterprise (R$697/month). All include AI access, dashboard, and support.

payment.a: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Stripe. Billing is monthly in Brazilian Reais (BRL).

cancellation.a: You can cancel at any time in billing settings. Access continues until the end of the paid period.

dataProtection.a: We use TLS encryption in transit, multi-factor authentication via Clerk, RBAC, and all data is stored on secure servers with automatic backups.

lgpd.a: Yes. We fully comply with the General Data Protection Law (LGPD). You can export or request deletion of your data at any time.

getHelp.a: Contact us at team@theiadvisor.com. Our average response time is 24 business hours.

contact.a: Our main support email is team@theiadvisor.com.

signingGuide.title: Signature verification
signingGuide.header: Every request includes the HMAC-SHA256 header below. Reject requests without a valid signature or with drift >5min.
signingGuide.retries: Retry policy: 1m, 2m, 5m, 15m, 60m, 240m. After 6 failed attempts the payload moves to dead-letter.

toast.scheduled: Run scheduled for the next minutes.

retention.title: Retention policies
retention.subtitle: TTL per resource. Old data is purged automatically every hour.
retention.hint: AUDIT_LOGS has an LGPD floor of 180 days. Chats purge only RESOLVED/ARCHIVED. Notifications purge only read. CSAT responses purge only terminal states.
